productDisplayName: Reebok Women Aviator Grey Sports Shoes
description: The reebok Aviator is a versatile running shoe that features ample ventilation and offers lightweight comfort, keeping your feet fresh and comfortable all day. Attractive, with a durable TPR outsole, they are perfect not just for your running/jogging sessions, but also work very well as all-day casual wear. UpperBreathable mesh upper for ample ventilation and reduced irritationSynthetic overlays for added shoe structure, durability and styleLace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized FitLushly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfortMesh tongue for maximum ventilationBrand name on tongue, lateral side and behind collarMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorptionCushioned footbed for all-day comfortFabric lining for increased comfortOutsoleTPR outsole for better shock absorption and durabilityCircular and triangular lugs for better traction on all surfacesTextured pattern on the heel for improved gripFlex grooves for ease of movementShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
